Wholesale supply

Custom Cake Cups Wholesale

Source custom printed cupcake liners and paper cake cups from a China manufacturer with food-grade materials, OEM/ODM design support and bulk export packaging.

  • Custom sizes, colors, artwork and carton packaging.
  • Certificate documents and buyer verification notes are visible before RFQ.
